items.en: No need to hurry / Take your time.

samples.pinyin: tā wèi érzi de ānquán zháojí.
samples.en: She is anxious about her son's safety.

samples.pinyin: tā zháojí ànshí wánchéng gōngzuò.
samples.en: He was anxious to finish the work on time.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen néng lǐjiě tā de zháojí.
samples.en: We understand his worry.

samples.sentence: 不要被他的著急影響到自己。
samples.pinyin: bùyào bèi tā de zháojí yǐngxiǎng dào zìjǐ.
samples.en: Don't be influenced by his anxiety.

samples.sentence: 明天還是下雨，記得帶傘。
samples.pinyin: míngtiān háishi xià yǔ, jìdé dài sǎn.
samples.en: It will still rain tomorrow; remember to take an umbrella.
samples.vi: Mai vẫn mưa đấy, nhớ mang ô.

samples.sentence: 這麼多年，我還是喜歡你。
samples.pinyin: zhème duōnián, wǒ háishi xǐhuan nǐ.
samples.en: After so many years, I still like you.
samples.vi: Nhiều năm như vậy, tôi vẫn cứ thích em.

samples.sentence: 你是上海人還是福建人？
samples.pinyin: nǐ shì Shànghǎi rén háishi Fújiàn rén?
samples.en: Are you from Shanghai or Fujian?
samples.vi: Cậu là người Thượng Hải hay người Phúc Kiến?

samples.sentence: 這件事是真的還是假的？
samples.pinyin: zhè jiàn shì shì zhēn de háishi jiǎ de?
samples.en: Is this matter true or false?
samples.vi: Việc này thật hay giả đấy?

samples.pinyin: tā jīntiān yī dà zǎo jiù zǒule.
samples.en: She left early in the morning today.

samples.pinyin: zǎoshang de kōngqì hěn qīngxīn.
samples.en: The morning air is very fresh.
samples.vi: Không khí buổi sáng rất trong lành.

samples.meaning: long ago; as early as; for a long time
samples.pinyin: zhè běn shū wǒ zǎo jiù kànguòle.
samples.en: I read this book a long time ago.

samples.meaning: long ago; as early as; for a long time
samples.pinyin: wǒ zǎo jiù zhīdào zhè jiàn shì.
samples.en: I have known about this for a long time.

samples.meaning: early; earlier than scheduled or planned
samples.pinyin: wǒ zǎozǎor jiù huí jiāle.
samples.en: I went home quite early.

samples.meaning: early; earlier than scheduled or planned
samples.pinyin: wǒ jīntiān láidé tài zǎole.
samples.en: I came too early today.

items.en: to invite someone / to make an appointment

samples.pinyin: wǒmen yuē zài xuéxiào ménkǒu jiàn.
samples.en: We arranged to meet at the school gate.

samples.pinyin: tāmen yuē hǎo xià zhōuyī pèngtóu.
samples.en: They agreed to meet next Monday.

samples.pinyin: tā zǒng shì jiànyuē, zhǔnshí dàodá.
samples.en: He always keeps his word and arrives on time.

samples.sentence: 雙方已經商約好了價格。
samples.pinyin: shuāngfāng yǐjīng shāng yuē hǎole jiàgé.
samples.en: Both parties have agreed on the price.

samples.pinyin: tā shēnghuó fēicháng jiéyuē.
samples.en: He lives very frugally.

samples.pinyin: tā yīxiàng zìfèng shèn yuē.
samples.en: She has always lived very modestly.

samples.pinyin: huìyì shì lǐ yǒu yuē 50 rén.
samples.en: There are approximately 50 people in the meeting room.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen děngle yuē 20 fēnzhōng.
samples.en: We waited for about 20 minutes.

items.en: on the other side of / opposite

samples.pinyin: cāochǎng de duìmiàn shì jiàoxué lóu.
samples.en: Opposite the playground is the teaching building.

samples.pinyin: mǎlù duìmiàn yǒu yīgè gōngyuán.
samples.en: There is a park on the opposite side of the road.

samples.pinyin: wǒmen duìmiànr zuòzhe tánhuà.
samples.en: We sit face to face and talk.

samples.sentence: 他們對麵兒坐著吃/喫飯。
samples.pinyin: tāmen duìmiànr zuòzhe chīfàn.
samples.en: They sit face to face to eat.
